Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class NetworkNewtonSolver.NetworkSolutionResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.NetworkNewtonSolver.NetworkSolutionResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
NetworkNewtonSolver
public static class NetworkNewtonSolver.NetworkSolutionResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a network solve.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

      private final double maxResidual

  • Constructor Details

    • NetworkSolutionResult

      public NetworkSolutionResult(boolean converged, int iterations, double maxResidual, Map<String,Double> nodePressures, Map<String,Double> branchFlows, String method)
      Creates a solution result.
      Parameters:
      converged - whether the solve converged
      iterations - number of iterations used
      maxResidual - final maximum absolute node residual in Sm3/day
      nodePressures - solved node pressures in bara keyed by node name
      branchFlows - branch flows in Sm3/day keyed by branch name
      method - solver method that produced the result

  • Method Details

    • isConverged

      public boolean isConverged()
      Returns whether the solve converged.
      Returns:
      true if converged

    • getIterations

      public int getIterations()
      Returns the number of iterations.
      Returns:
      iteration count

    • getMaxResidual

      public double getMaxResidual()
      Returns the final maximum absolute node residual.
      Returns:
      residual in Sm3/day

    • getNodePressures

      public Map<String,Double> getNodePressures()
      Returns the solved node pressures.
      Returns:
      map of node name to pressure in bara

    • getBranchFlows

      public Map<String,Double> getBranchFlows()
      Returns the branch flows.
      Returns:
      map of branch name to flow in Sm3/day

    • getMethod

      public String getMethod()
      Returns the solver method used.
      Returns:
      solver method name
